name: Motorola Solutions, Inc.
summary: Motorola Solutions, Inc. is a global technology company focused on public safety and enterprise security. The company provides mission-critical communications products and services including land mobile radio systems, video security solutions, and command center software. Its customers include government agencies, law enforcement, fire and emergency services, and commercial enterprises requiring reliable communications infrastructure.

products.name: Land Mobile Radio Systems
products.description: Mission-critical communications systems for public safety and enterprise customers.

products.name: Video Security Solutions
products.description: Video surveillance and security hardware for public safety and enterprise use.

products.name: Command Center Software
products.description: Software solutions for command and control operations in public safety environments.

products.name: iDEN
products.description: Integrated Digital Enhanced Network, a registered trademark communications platform.

people.name: Andrew Spinola
people.role: Analyst, UBS Securities LLC  Adam Tindle   – Analyst, Raymond James & Associates, Inc
